payload.title: Validate deploy-free sync transports + document workflow
payload.description:
Validate the deploy-free sync transports and document the collaboration workflow.

## Work
- Git: the primary path. .scope/events/ commits cleanly; git pull brings peers' event files; replay reconciles.
- Dumb file sync: verify iCloud / Dropbox / Syncthing on .scope/events/ also converge.
- Document "collaborate via git pull, deploy nothing" in README + agent skill.

## Acceptance
- Two clones, divergent edits, git pull both ways -> identical boards, no manual conflict resolution, no SQLite shared.
